title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 10 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 96%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 100%, and average score is 7.89/10. Total training hours are 216 and scaled cost is 15. Overall effectiveness classification is Effective. Management interpretation: The training course 'DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring' has demonstrated high effectiveness with a completion rate of 100%, a pass rate of 100%, and an average score of 7.89 out of 10. The overall attendance rate stands at 96%, indicating strong engagement among participants. The course has also received a favorable feedback rating of 4.6 out of 5, suggesting that trainees found the content valuable.
insights: DevOps Fundamentals: CI/CD, K8s, Monitoring has an effectiveness score of 92.28 in the selected scope.
The course's effectiveness classification is rated as Effective, supported by the metrics of high attendance, completion, and pass rates.
The total training hours amounted to 216, with a scaled cost of 15, resulting in a ROI proxy of 0.0207.
These metrics indicate that the course was not only well-attended but also successfully met its learning objectives.
recommendations: Maintain the current delivery model and reuse top-performing materials for future cohorts.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.
